subcommands.name: compile
subcommands.description: Compiles an input file into a supported output format

name: --root
options.description: Configures the project root (for absolute paths)

name: --font-path
options.description: Adds additional directories to search for fonts

name: --diagnostic-format
options.description: The format to emit diagnostics in

name: -f
--format
options.description: The format of the output file, inferred from the extension by default

name: --open
options.description: Opens the output file using the default viewer after compilation

name: --ppi
options.description: The PPI (pixels per inch) to use for PNG export

name: --flamegraph
options.description: Produces a flamegraph of the compilation process

name: -h
--help
options.description: Print help

args.name: output
args.description: Path to output file (PDF, PNG, or SVG)

subcommands.name: query
subcommands.description: Processes an input file to extract provided metadata

name: --root
options.description: Configures the project root (for absolute paths)

name: --font-path
options.description: Adds additional directories to search for fonts

name: --diagnostic-format
options.description: The format to emit diagnostics in

name: --field
options.description: Extracts just one field from all retrieved elements

name: --format
options.description: The format to serialize in

name: --one
options.description: Expects and retrieves exactly one element

name: -h
--help
options.description: Print help

subcommands.name: fonts
subcommands.description: Lists all discovered fonts in system and custom font paths

name: --font-path
options.description: Adds additional directories to search for fonts

name: --variants
options.description: Also lists style variants of each font family

name: -h
--help
options.description: Print help

name: --force
options.description: Forces a downgrade to an older version (required for downgrading)

name: --revert
options.description: Reverts to the version from before the last update (only possible if `typst update` has previously ran)

name: -h
--help
options.description: Print help

args.name: version
args.description: Which version to update to (defaults to latest)

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

name: --cert
options.description: Path to a custom CA certificate to use when making network requests

name: -v
--verbosity
options.description: Sets the level of logging verbosity: -v = warning & error, -vv = info, -vvv = debug, -vvvv = trace

name: -h
--help
options.description: Print help

name: -V
--version
options.description: Print version
